# Thickening Time Test

**Summary**: A test to determine the time a cement slurry remains pumpable.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-ahmed|Ahmed, 2017]] used HPHT consistometers to measure thickening times under well conditions.
